title: Follow naming conventions for Spring bean names
description: Spring beans should be named according to established conventions to ensure clarity and maintainability. Consistent bean naming helps avoid confusion and potential conflicts in large applications. Adhering to naming standards improves code readability and integration with Spring tooling.
recommendation: Name all Spring beans following standard conventions, such as using camelCase and meaningful, descriptive names.

target_check.message: Bean method name should follow camelCase convention and not use ALL_CAPS or PascalCase.
